Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.package_name: Romantic Bali Escape: Unforgettable Moments of Ubud & Kuta
packages.overview: Bali, the "Island of the Gods," isn’t just a destination—it’s a love story waiting to be written. Imagine strolling hand in hand along the golden shores of Nusa Dua as the sun melts into the horizon, or sharing a private candlelit dinner beneath Uluwatu’s cliffside temple, where waves whisper ancient secrets. Escape into the lush embrace of Ubud’s emerald rice terraces, where hidden waterfalls and flower-filled pools create the perfect setting for romance. Set sail on a sunset cruise, champagne in hand, as the ocean breeze carries your dreams into the starlit sky. From intimate jungle retreats to floating breakfasts in infinity pools, Bali elevates love into an art form. Whether it's a serene morning in a floating bamboo villa or an adventurous scooter ride through misty highlands, every moment in Bali feels like a scene from a timeless romance—one that lingers long after you leave.

Arrive in Bali, where Travelxploria’s representative welcomes you and ensures a smooth transfer to your cozy Ubud stay. With the best on-ground support staff and experienced guides from you’ll explore Bali’s most romantic gems effortlessly. Walk along Nusa Dua’s golden shores, enjoy a candlelit dinner on Uluwatu’s cliffs, or discover Ubud’s hidden waterfalls with our expert guide. Start your day with a delicious breakfast before our representative from Travelxploria picks you up for an unforgettable Seminyak tour, blending culture, shopping, and beachside relaxation. Begin at the Petitenget Temple, a centuries-old Balinese gem adorned with intricate carvings and offering breathtaking ocean views, where you’ll learn about its spiritual significance. Stroll through Seminyak Square, a vibrant hub of boutique shops, art galleries, and trendy cafés, perfect for indulging in local crafts and designer finds. Relax at Double Six Beach, a stunning stretch of golden sand, ideal for sunbathing or trying thrilling water sports like surfing and parasailing. Stop by La Plancha, an iconic beachfront bar with colorful bean bags, tropical cocktails, and panoramic sunset views. As the evening falls soak in the golden hues at Seminyak Beach, capturing worthy moments. Finally,return to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Seminyak’s coastal charm.

packages.overview:
Escape to the tropical paradise of Bali with Travelxploria, a leading travel agency based in Kolkata, India. Immerse yourself in the enchanting beauty of this Indonesian island, known for its stunning beaches, lush rice terraces, and vibrant culture.

Travelxploria offers meticulously crafted Bali tour packages, ensuring an unforgettable experience tailored to your preferences. Explore the iconic rice fields of Ubud, where tranquility and natural beauty converge. Discover ancient temples like Tanah Lot and Uluwatu, perched on dramatic cliffs overlooking the sparkling Indian Ocean.

Indulge in the unique cultural experiences that Bali has to offer. Witness traditional dance performances, participate in Balinese cooking classes, or rejuvenate your mind and body with yoga and meditation retreats. Bali’s spirituality and artistic heritage create a captivating ambiance that lingers long after your visit.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Lempuyang Temple and Tirta Gangga with Travelxploria, the best travel agency, ensuring you an unforgettable Balinese adventure. Your day begins with a hotel pick-up by our friendly representative and expert tour guide, who will provide insights into Bali’s rich culture and traditions. Visit the iconic Lempuyang Temple, home to the famous \"Gates of Heaven,\" where you can capture mesmerizing photos with Mount Agung as your backdrop. Next, explore the enchanting Tirta Gangga Water Palace, known for its royal gardens, sacred fountains, and koi-filled ponds. Enjoy the serene atmosphere and take in the beauty of Bali’s cultural heritage. Conclude your journey with a comfortable drop-off at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day in Bali.

The Kecak Fire Danceis one of Bali’s most mesmerizing cultural performances, and witnessing it at Uluwatu Templemakes it even more magical. Set against the backdrop of the stunning ocean sunset, this traditional Balinese dance-dramatells the epic tale of the Ramayana, featuring Prince Rama, his beloved Sita, and the mighty Hanuman battling the evil King Ravana. What makes this performance unique is the hypnotic chorus of over 70 men, rhythmically chanting “chak-chak-chak” as they form a living orchestra without any instruments. As the story unfolds, dramatic movements, intricate costumes, and fiery visuals captivate the audience. The climax features Hanuman playfully dancing through flames, adding to the thrilling experience. This enchanting performance, held in an open-airamphitheater atop Uluwatu’s cliff, offers a breathtaking fusion of storytelling, culture, and nature. After the show, soak in the magical atmosphere before a smooth ride back to your hotel with Travelxploria.

Begin your day with our friendly representative from Travelxploria, picks you up from your hotel for an unforgettable Nusa Penida West Island Tour. Enjoy a smooth transfer to the harbor, where you’ll board a scenic speedboat to this stunning island paradise. Upon arrival, our guide will lead you to Kelingking Beach, famous for its T-Rex-shaped cliffs and breathtaking ocean views. Next, witness the natural infinity pool at Angel’s Billabong, where crystal-clear waters meet dramatic rock formations. Continue your journey to Broken Beach, a mesmerizing coastal formation with a natural arch over the sea. unwind at Crystal Bay, a serene beach with pristine waters, perfect for swimming and sunbathing. Midway through your adventure, indulge in a delicious local lunch, savoring the flavors of the island. As the day winds down, relax with a smooth drop-off at your hotel, leaving you with incredible memories.

packages.overview:
• Warm welcome at the airport followed by en route visits to a spice garden and Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage before reaching Kandy.
  • Full-day exploration of Kandy’s cultural treasures including the Temple of the Tooth, Royal Botanical Gardens, and a traditional cultural dance show.
  • Scenic drive to Nuwara Eliya with stops at Ramboda Waterfalls, Hanuman Temple, and visits to tea plantations and colonial landmarks.
  • Discover Ella’s natural wonders like Ravana Falls and Nine Arch Bridge before heading to Yala for an overnight stay.
  • Morning departure to Mirissa for leisure time on serene beaches and optional whale-watching adventures.
  • Explore the historic Galle Dutch Fort and lighthouse before enjoying the beaches and water sports in Bentota.
  • Return to Colombo for a city tour covering iconic sites like Galle Face, Pettah Bazaar, Colombo Museum, and the Lotus Tower.
  • After breakfast, transfer to the airport with cherished memories of your Sri Lankan adventure.

[{"city":"Kandy","country":"Sri Lanka","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Sri Lanka/Kandy/1744963452072-AdobeStock_82844404.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Sri Lanka/Kandy/1744963452962-AdobeStock_293028698.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Sri Lanka/Kandy/1744963453747-AdobeStock_364951258.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Airport to Kandy","day_summary":"

Upon your arrival at Colombo Bandaranaike International Airport, you will be warmly welcomed by our Travelxploria representative. After a brief introduction, you will be escorted to your comfortable vehicle to begin your exciting holiday in Sri Lanka.

Your first destination will be the beautiful city of Kandy.

En route, enjoy a complimentary visit to a Spice Garden, where you can discover the rich aromas and flavors of Sri Lankan spices.

You will also visit the renowned Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage, a sanctuary that cares for orphaned and injured wild elephants. Located in the village of Pinnawala, this facility hosts the largest herd of captive elephants in the world and has been a vital part of conservation efforts since its establishment in 1975 by the Sri Lanka Department of Wildlife Conservation.

After an enriching day of sightseeing, proceed to Kandy for check-in.

Overnight stay at your hotel in Kandy.

Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka, with a fascinating stop at a spice garden in Matale along the way. Learn about Sri Lanka’s world-famous spices, which have been treasured for centuries and remain a celebrated export today.

In the evening, visit the Royal Botanic Gardens in Peradeniya, located just 5.5 km west of Kandy near the banks of the Mahaweli River. Renowned for its lush landscapes and impressive collection of orchids, the garden attracts over a million visitors each year.

At 4:45 PM, experience the spirit of Sri Lanka with a Cultural Dance Show, where traditional music, vibrant costumes, and age-old dance rituals come alive in an enthralling performance.

After the show, proceed to your hotel in Kandy for check-in and relaxation.

Dinner and overnight stay in Kandy.

Begin your scenic journey upcountry to Nuwara Eliya, often referred to as “Little England” for its cool climate and colonial charm. En route, visit the majestic Ramboda Waterfalls, a tea plantation and factory to witness the art of Ceylon tea-making, and the revered Sri Bhakta Hanuman Temple, nestled amidst the misty hills.

Arrive in Nuwara Eliya, perched at 6,200 feet above sea level, where you'll be enchanted by its old-world English charm—quaint cottages, beautifully manicured gardens, and the grand colonial architecture of the Grand Hotel. The city also features a historic golf course and hosts horse racing events, adding to its British countryside vibe.

Visit the Sita Amman Temple, a sacred site believed to be associated with the Ramayana epic, featuring vibrant statues and sculptures depicting the tales of Rama and Sita. Later, stroll around the scenic Gregory Lake, a picturesque reservoir set amidst the rolling tea hills, and unwind at Victoria Park, a beautifully maintained public park established during the colonial era.

After a fulfilling day, check in to your hotel and relax.Dinner and overnight stay in Nuwara Eliya.

After breakfast at the hotel, proceed to the charming town of Ella, located about 250 kilometers from Colombo in the scenic Badulla district. Famous for its breathtaking landscapes and connections to the legendary tale of the Ramayana, Ella offers stunning attractions such as the Ravana Falls viewpoint, the iconic Nine Arch Bridge, and the spectacular Ella Gap Viewpoint, which offers panoramic vistas of the surrounding hills. Enjoy leisurely excursions through this picturesque region before continuing your journey to Yala.

Overnight stay at a hotel in Yala.

After breakfast at the hotel, head to Mirissa, a picturesque town on Sri Lanka’s south coast in the Matara District. Located approximately 150 kilometers south of Colombo, Mirissa sits just four meters above sea level and is famed for its serene beaches and vibrant nightlife. Unlike the busier coastal resorts, Mirissa offers a more secluded feel, with two beautiful sandy bays divided by a rocky island accessible at low tide. The town is dotted with cozy bars and surf rentals, but its true highlight is the thrilling whale-watching tours available from May to November. During your visit, explore attractions such as the stunning Coconut Tree Hill, the hidden gem of Secret Beach, and embark on an unforgettable whale-watching adventure.

Overnight stay at a hotel in Mirissa.

​

After breakfast, set out to explore the scenic coastal city of Bentota, located on the southern shores of Sri Lanka. Known for its natural beauty and birdlife, Bentota is a haven for nature lovers, with opportunities to spot rare species such as the Indian Heron and various migratory birds along the riverbanks.

Begin your day with a Madu River boat ride, a serene journey through lush mangroves and vibrant wetlands. This ecological treasure is home to a wide variety of flora and fauna, including 70 species of fish, 50 types of butterflies, and over 100 species of birds—making it a paradise for wildlife and bird enthusiasts.

Next, visit the Kosgoda Turtle Hatchery, a vital conservation project dedicated to protecting Sri Lanka’s endangered sea turtles. Learn about the life cycle of turtles and witness the heartwarming sight of baby turtles being cared for before they are released into the sea.

In the evening, enjoy some thrilling water sports activities in Bentota, such as jet skiing, banana boat rides, or windsurfing, perfect for adventure seekers.

Dinner and overnight stay in Bentota.

This ecological treasure is home to a wide variety of flora and fauna, including 70 species of fish, 50 types of butterflies, and over 100 species of birds—making it a paradise for wildlife and bird enthusiasts.

Next, visit the Kosgoda Turtle Hatchery, a vital conservation project dedicated to protecting Sri Lanka’s endangered sea turtles. Learn about the life cycle of turtles and witness the heartwarming sight of baby turtles being cared for before they are released into the sea.

In the evening, enjoy some thrilling water sports activities in Bentota, such as jet skiing, banana boat rides, or windsurfing, perfect for adventure seekers.

Dinner and overnight stay in Bentota.

Welcome to Colombo, the vibrant former capital and the largest metropolis in Sri Lanka. As the country's commercial and entertainment hub, Colombo is alive with modern skyscrapers, upscale restaurants, luxury spas, shopping malls, hotels, and a lively nightlife scene. Its wide, tree-lined boulevards add a unique tropical charm, making it both a bustling city and a serene escape.

Enjoy a leisurely stroll through Galle Face Green, a seaside promenade that offers some of the most breathtaking sunsets on the island. Sip on a cocktail at an open-air terrace as the sky transforms into a brilliant canvas of gold, orange, and purple over the Indian Ocean.

Treat yourself to a delicious lunch at the renowned Ministry of Crab (at your own expense), one of Asia’s top seafood restaurants, known for its fresh, flavorful Sri Lankan lagoon crabs.

After lunch, indulge in a shopping spree. Explore popular malls such as Majestic City, Liberty Plaza, and Crescat Boulevard, where you’ll find garments, books, handicrafts, and leather goods at competitive prices. For a more local experience, dive into the bustling Pettah Bazaar, where you can shop for a variety of items at bargain rates. Don't miss out on tourist favorites like ODEL and Arina, offering a wide range of fashionable apparel and souvenirs.


Check in to your hotel and unwind after a vibrant day in the city.Dinner and overnight stay in Colombo.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Sri Lanka, meet Travelxploria representative, and transfer to the beautiful coastal town of Negombo for a relaxing evening.

  • Visit the Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage en route, explore the sacred Temple of the Tooth, and enjoy a vibrant Kandyan cultural show.

  • Discover panoramic views from Kandy View Point, visit Ramboda Falls, Hanuman Temple, and relax by Gregory Lake in Nuwara Eliya.

  • Enjoy scenic waterfalls, optional white water rafting at Kitulgala, and head to the golden beaches of Hikkaduwa.

  • Embark on a Madu River Boat tour, explore Colombo’s dynamic shopping scene, and relax by Mount Lavinia Beach.

  • Enjoy final sightseeing or shopping in Colombo before departing with wonderful memories of Sri Lanka.

Discover the enchanting beauty and rich culture of Sri Lanka with our exclusive 5-nights, 6-days tour. From the very moment you arrive at the airport, your unforgettable journey begins.

Upon your arrival at Katunayake International Airport, our Travelxploria Representative will warmly welcome you with a friendly smile and assist you throughout your journey, ensuring a seamless and comfortable start to your adventure.

Today, you will be comfortably transferred to the charming coastal town of Negombo. Relax as you stroll along the golden sandy beaches, indulge in the freshest seafood, and experience the vibrant local life that Negombo is known for. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive, while we take care of every detail to make your journey smooth, comfortable, and memorable.

Once again, a heartfelt welcome to Sri Lanka from all of us at Travelxploria. We look forward to creating lasting memories with you!

Overnight stay in Negombo.

Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka, with a fascinating stop at a spice garden in Matale along the way. Learn about Sri Lanka’s world-famous spices, which have been treasured for centuries and remain a celebrated export today.

In the evening, visit the Royal Botanic Gardens in Peradeniya, located just 5.5 km west of Kandy near the banks of the Mahaweli River. Renowned for its lush landscapes and impressive collection of orchids, the garden attracts over a million visitors each year.

At 4:45 PM, experience the spirit of Sri Lanka with a Cultural Dance Show, where traditional music, vibrant costumes, and age-old dance rituals come alive in an enthralling performance.

After the show, proceed to your hotel in Kandy for check-in and relaxation.

Dinner and overnight stay in Kandy.

Begin your scenic journey upcountry to Nuwara Eliya, often referred to as “Little England” for its cool climate and colonial charm. En route, visit the majestic Ramboda Waterfalls, a tea plantation and factory to witness the art of Ceylon tea-making, and the revered Sri Bhakta Hanuman Temple, nestled amidst the misty hills.

Arrive in Nuwara Eliya, perched at 6,200 feet above sea level, where you'll be enchanted by its old-world English charm—quaint cottages, beautifully manicured gardens, and the grand colonial architecture of the Grand Hotel. The city also features a historic golf course and hosts horse racing events, adding to its British countryside vibe.

Visit the Sita Amman Temple, a sacred site believed to be associated with the Ramayana epic, featuring vibrant statues and sculptures depicting the tales of Rama and Sita. Later, stroll around the scenic Gregory Lake, a picturesque reservoir set amidst the rolling tea hills, and unwind at Victoria Park, a beautifully maintained public park established during the colonial era.

After a fulfilling day, check in to your hotel and relax.Dinner and overnight stay in Nuwara Eliya.

Hikkaduwa is a charming coastal town on Sri Lanka’s southern shore, renowned for its golden beaches, vibrant coral reefs, and relaxed, beachside vibe. Its crystal-clear waters make it an ideal destination for snorkeling, diving, and soaking up the tropical sunshine.

A special highlight of Hikkaduwa is the chance to interact with baby turtles, which can often be seen along the public beach. These gentle creatures occasionally come close to shore, where locals and visitors alike can feed them small bits of food—a truly heartwarming and unforgettable experience for nature lovers and families.

Dinner and overnight stay in Hikkaduwa.

A special highlight of Hikkaduwa is the chance to interact with baby turtles, which can often be seen along the public beach. These gentle creatures occasionally come close to shore, where locals and visitors alike can feed them small bits of food—a truly heartwarming and unforgettable experience for nature lovers and families.

Dinner and overnight stay in Hikkaduwa.

Welcome to Colombo, the vibrant former capital and the largest metropolis in Sri Lanka. As the country's commercial and entertainment hub, Colombo is alive with modern skyscrapers, upscale restaurants, luxury spas, shopping malls, hotels, and a lively nightlife scene. Its wide, tree-lined boulevards add a unique tropical charm, making it both a bustling city and a serene escape.

Enjoy a leisurely stroll through Galle Face Green, a seaside promenade that offers some of the most breathtaking sunsets on the island. Sip on a cocktail at an open-air terrace as the sky transforms into a brilliant canvas of gold, orange, and purple over the Indian Ocean.

Treat yourself to a delicious lunch at the renowned Ministry of Crab (at your own expense), one of Asia’s top seafood restaurants, known for its fresh, flavorful Sri Lankan lagoon crabs.

After lunch, indulge in a shopping spree. Explore popular malls such as Majestic City, Liberty Plaza, and Crescat Boulevard, where you’ll find garments, books, handicrafts, and leather goods at competitive prices. For a more local experience, dive into the bustling Pettah Bazaar, where you can shop for a variety of items at bargain rates. Don't miss out on tourist favorites like ODEL and Arina, offering a wide range of fashionable apparel and souvenirs.


Check in to your hotel and unwind after a vibrant day in the city.Dinner and overnight stay in Colombo.

On your final day in Sri Lanka, after breakfast, and depending on your departure flight time, you may enjoy some last-minute shopping or sightseeing in vibrant Colombo.

As your memorable journey through the beauty and culture of Sri Lanka comes to a close, we at Travelxploria, along with your dedicated Travelxploria Representative, would like to express our heartfelt gratitude for choosing us to be a part of your adventure. It has been our sincere pleasure to guide you through the wonders of our island, creating memories that we hope you will cherish for a lifetime.

We wish you a safe and pleasant journey back home. Please stay in touch, and we eagerly look forward to welcoming you again on your next visit to Sri Lanka.

End of the Tour.

packages.overview:
• Arrival at Katunayake Airport, visit Munnewaram and Manawari Hindu Temples in Chillaw, then proceed to Sigiriya for an overnight stay after visiting Dambulla Golden Temple.
  • Climb Sigiriya Rock Fortress, visit a Spice Garden, explore the Temple of the Tooth, and enjoy a cultural show in Kandy.
  • Visit the Temple of the Tooth and Kandy View Point, then journey to Nuwara Eliya, stopping at Ramboda Waterfall and Hanuman Temple, with a boat ride option at Gregory Lake.
  • Travel to Ella, visit the Sita Amman Temple, and explore the Nine Arch Bridge and Ella’s scenic landscapes.
  • Visit the Murugan Temple in Kataragama, a significant Ramayana site, and explore its spiritual surroundings.
  • Stop at Ussangoda Ramayana Site, visit Rumassala Sanjeevani Mountain, explore Galle Dutch Fort, and relax at Hikkaduwa Beach.
  • Enjoy a boat ride on the Hikkaduwa River, visit Pancha Muga Anjaneyer Temple, and explore Colombo with shopping, a city tour, and visits to cultural landmarks.
  • Last-minute shopping or sightseeing in Colombo before departure, concluding the tour with heartfelt gratitude from Supreme Travels.

","day_summary":"


Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka, with a fascinating stop at a spice garden in Matale along the way. Learn about Sri Lanka’s world-famous spices, which have been treasured for centuries and remain a celebrated export today.

In the evening, visit the Royal Botanic Gardens in Peradeniya, located just 5.5 km west of Kandy near the banks of the Mahaweli River. Renowned for its lush landscapes and impressive collection of orchids, the garden attracts over a million visitors each year.

At 4:45 PM, experience the spirit of Sri Lanka with a Cultural Dance Show, where traditional music, vibrant costumes, and age-old dance rituals come alive in an enthralling performance.

After the show, proceed to your hotel in Kandy for check-in and relaxation.

Dinner and overnight stay in Kandy.

Begin your scenic journey upcountry to Nuwara Eliya, often referred to as “Little England” for its cool climate and colonial charm. En route, visit the majestic Ramboda Waterfalls, a tea plantation and factory to witness the art of Ceylon tea-making, and the revered Sri Bhakta Hanuman Temple, nestled amidst the misty hills.

Arrive in Nuwara Eliya, perched at 6,200 feet above sea level, where you'll be enchanted by its old-world English charm—quaint cottages, beautifully manicured gardens, and the grand colonial architecture of the Grand Hotel. The city also features a historic golf course and hosts horse racing events, adding to its British countryside vibe.

Visit the Sita Amman Temple, a sacred site believed to be associated with the Ramayana epic, featuring vibrant statues and sculptures depicting the tales of Rama and Sita. Later, stroll around the scenic Gregory Lake, a picturesque reservoir set amidst the rolling tea hills, and unwind at Victoria Park, a beautifully maintained public park established during the colonial era.

After a fulfilling day, check in to your hotel and relax.Dinner and overnight stay in Nuwara Eliya.

After breakfast, begin your scenic journey to Ella, one of Sri Lanka’s most enchanting highland destinations. Along the way, visit the sacred Seetha Amman Temple, located in the village of Seetha Eliya, just 1 km from the Hakgala Botanical Garden. According to the Ramayana epic, this is believed to be the place where Seetha was held captive by King Ravana, and today the temple stands as a place of devotion and historical significance.

Continue onwards to Ella, a serene hill country village nestled among lush greenery, misty mountains, and tea plantations. Known for its cool climate and laid-back charm, Ella is a haven for hikers and nature lovers alike.

Explore the highlights of Ella, including a visit to the iconic Nine Arch Bridge, a marvel of colonial-era railway construction set amidst dense jungle. Embark on a short hike to Little Adam’s Peak for panoramic views of the valley, and enjoy a relaxed Ella city tour, taking in the town’s cozy cafés, markets, and tranquil surroundings.

Dinner and overnight stay in Ella, surrounded by its peaceful, picture-perfect landscapes.

Dinner and overnight stay in Ella, surrounded by its peaceful, picture-perfect landscapes.

After breakfast in Ella, embark on a scenic drive to Kataragama, a journey of approximately 3 to 4 hours through Sri Lanka’s stunning southern landscapes. The route winds through tea plantations, lush forests, and rolling hills, offering breathtaking views along the way.

En route, make a stop at the enchanting Ravana Waterfall, one of Sri Lanka’s most beautiful and legendary cascades. Tied to the Ramayana epic, this waterfall is not only a natural wonder but also a site of mythological significance.

Upon arrival in Kataragama, visit the revered Murugan Temple, one of the island’s most important spiritual sites. Dedicated to Lord Murugan (also known as Kartikeya), the Hindu god of war and the son of Lord Shiva and Parvati, the temple draws devotees of multiple faiths, making it a powerful symbol of religious harmony.

Dinner and overnight stay in Kataragama.

Hikkaduwa is a charming coastal town on Sri Lanka’s southern shore, renowned for its golden beaches, vibrant coral reefs, and relaxed, beachside vibe. Its crystal-clear waters make it an ideal destination for snorkeling, diving, and soaking up the tropical sunshine.

A special highlight of Hikkaduwa is the chance to interact with baby turtles, which can often be seen along the public beach. These gentle creatures occasionally come close to shore, where locals and visitors alike can feed them small bits of food—a truly heartwarming and unforgettable experience for nature lovers and families.

Dinner and overnight stay in Hikkaduwa.

Welcome to Colombo, the vibrant former capital and the largest metropolis in Sri Lanka. As the country's commercial and entertainment hub, Colombo is alive with modern skyscrapers, upscale restaurants, luxury spas, shopping malls, hotels, and a lively nightlife scene. Its wide, tree-lined boulevards add a unique tropical charm, making it both a bustling city and a serene escape.

Enjoy a leisurely stroll through Galle Face Green, a seaside promenade that offers some of the most breathtaking sunsets on the island. Sip on a cocktail at an open-air terrace as the sky transforms into a brilliant canvas of gold, orange, and purple over the Indian Ocean.

Treat yourself to a delicious lunch at the renowned Ministry of Crab (at your own expense), one of Asia’s top seafood restaurants, known for its fresh, flavorful Sri Lankan lagoon crabs.

After lunch, indulge in a shopping spree. Explore popular malls such as Majestic City, Liberty Plaza, and Crescat Boulevard, where you’ll find garments, books, handicrafts, and leather goods at competitive prices. For a more local experience, dive into the bustling Pettah Bazaar, where you can shop for a variety of items at bargain rates. Don't miss out on tourist favorites like ODEL and Arina, offering a wide range of fashionable apparel and souvenirs.


Check in to your hotel and unwind after a vibrant day in the city.Dinner and overnight stay in Colombo.

On your final day, after breakfast, take the opportunity to enjoy some last-minute shopping or sightseeing in Colombo. As your unforgettable journey through the beauty and culture of Sri Lanka comes to an end, we at Travelxploria would like to extend our heartfelt gratitude for choosing us to be part of your adventure. End of the Tour.

Wishing you a safe journey!

packages.overview:
• Here at Furaveri Maldives, a premier luxury resort in Maldives, we offer a variety of cozy options for your stay, from entry level Garden Villas to luxurious Ocean Pool Villas and Residences, which have been specifically designed to meet guests individual preferences and are set among lush vegetation and over water, on a sandy white beach or settled above a sparkling turquoise lagoon.
  • Take experiences and adventures to the next level with our watersports team, Reyla Adventures. Our team offers a wide variety of motorized and non-motorized activities and excursions in the Maldives for you to live the adventure.

Arrival in paradise marks the beginning of your dream escape to the Maldives. As you land at the airport, a warm welcome awaits from a Travelxploria representative who will escort you to your luxurious beachfront resort. Check in, refresh, and soak in the stunning turquoise views right from your villa. Feel the soft sand beneath your feet and let the gentle ocean breeze relax your senses. Wake up to the sound of gentle waves and enjoy a leisurely breakfast by the beach. Spend the morning exploring the island—bike through nature trails, visit the local hydroponic garden, or relax on the beach with a good book. After lunch, pamper yourself at Furaveri Spa, where holistic treatments are offered in a serene garden or overwater setting. As the sun begins to set, consider a sunset cruise or simply unwind with cocktails at the beach bar, followed by a delicious seafood dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Adventure or Serenity – Your Choice","day_summary":"

Today is yours to tailor. Opt for adventure with activities like kayaking, snorkeling at the house reef, or joining an excursion to nearby sandbanks and uninhabited islands. Alternatively, enjoy a relaxed day soaking in the sun, taking a yoga session, or joining a Maldivian cooking class. In the evening, treat yourself to a beachfront BBQ or romantic candlelight dinner by the ocean.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Furaveri","day_summary":"

On your final day in paradise, take an early morning beach walk and savor a tropical breakfast. Enjoy your last swim or a peaceful moment on your villa deck before checking out. You’ll then be transferred back to Malé via seaplane or domestic flight, leaving with lasting memories of your beachfront escape at Furaveri Maldives.

packages.overview:
• Sleek and spacious accommodations make Sun Siyam Iru Veli the ultimate tropical retreat. With front row lagoon views and a freshwater pool for every five star suite, all you have to do is check in, chill out and let our neighbouring dolphins provide your entertainment as they swim past each day.
  • From the moment you arrive, shoes are left at the door, so forget dress codes and come as you are. Here we live the barefoot idyll, so sit back and sink your toes into the softest white sand – it doesn’t get better than this.
  • Priding ourselves on innovation, our main restaurant has a daily-changing menu to mix up seasonal flavours, and we serve plenty of the ocean’s bounty with the best seafood you’ll ever taste. You can even watch exotic fish pass under the glass floor below as you sink into a relaxing massage. It’s time to discover the true meaning of rest and rejuvenation here on our sapphire waters.

Upon arrival at Velana International Airport in Malé, you’ll be whisked away on a scenic 40-minute seaplane flight to the stunning island of Sun Siyam Iru Veli. After a warm Maldivian welcome, check into your spacious Beach Villa with a private pool, steps away from powder-soft sands and turquoise waters. Spend your afternoon soaking up the sun, dipping into your pool, or enjoying the tranquil beach. In the evening, enjoy a gourmet dinner at Aqua Orange, the resort’s all-day dining venue offering global cuisine in a beautiful lagoon-front setting.

Start your day with an ocean-view breakfast, then explore the lagoon with included non-motorized water sports like kayaking, snorkeling, or stand-up paddleboarding. For diving enthusiasts, consider booking an optional scuba excursion to the nearby coral reefs. In the afternoon, indulge in a luxurious treatment at Sun Siyam Spa, with its serene overwater pavilions and holistic therapies. Wrap up your day with sunset cocktails at Chemistry Bar followed by dinner at Grouper Grill, where fresh seafood is the star.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Adventure or Pure Relaxation – You Choose","day_summary":"

Enjoy your morning at leisure—opt for a sunrise beach walk, private yoga session, or simply lounge by your villa’s pool. After breakfast, embark on an optional dolphin-spotting cruise or sandbank picnic for a picture-perfect afternoon. If you prefer to stay on the island, relax at the infinity pool or join a wine-tasting session hosted by the resort’s sommelier. End your final night with a romantic private dining experience on the beach, under a blanket of stars.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure – Last Moments in Paradise","day_summary":"

Savor your final island breakfast and take in the peaceful atmosphere one last time. Enjoy a swim or short beach stroll before check-out. You’ll then board your return seaplane to Malé, carrying with you the serene memories of your 3-night beach villa escape at Sun Siyam Iru Veli.

packages.overview:
• Traditional Maldives meets modern design at Sun Siyam Olhuveli, with accommodationsr anging from Maldivian-inspired suites to sleek contemporary villas. Designed to cater to your every whim, we’ve three pools to choose from, including an adults-only infinity pool that never fails to impress – but be warned, the lagoon may entice you into adventure.
  • It all begins on the water, and whether it’s parasailing, kitesurfing or diving, there’s countless ways tostay active. Our outstanding cuisine holds the ocean at its heart, too, with creative menus served across our selection ofrestaurants and bars, all prepared by world-class chefs.

Once at the resort, check in to your Beach Villa nestled along the soft white sands. Spend the rest of the day at your leisure—unwind on your private sun loungers, take a dip in the clear waters, or explore the lush surroundings. As evening sets in, enjoy a peaceful sunset stroll along the beach followed by a delicious beachfront dinner under the stars.

Spend your afternoon lounging or exploring the vibrant marine life just beneath your villa. As the sun dips below the horizon, enjoy signature cocktails at the overwater bar before indulging in a gourmet dinner surrounded by panoramic sea views.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Overwater Indulgence & Exploration","day_summary":"

Start your day with breakfast served on your deck or in the ocean-view restaurant. Today is perfect for immersing yourself in the Maldivian paradise—kayak across calm lagoons, try paddleboarding, or book a dolphin-watching cruise to spot playful pods in the wild. For a unique experience, opt for a sandbank picnic or an island-hopping tour. In the evening, enjoy your final night with a fine dining experience, perhaps paired with a glass of wine and the sounds of gentle waves beneath you.

packages.package_name: Centara Collection, Machchafushi Island Resort & Spa Maldives
packages.overview:
• Indulge in the ultimate immersive journey at Machchafushi Island Resort & Spa Maldives, The Centara Collection, where authentic Maldivian-Thai experiences seamlessly intertwine with breathtaking nature and unparalleled underwater treasures waiting to be explored.
  • Discover 112 spacious beachfront and overwater villas with unrivalled views of the twinkling Indian Ocean and award-winning house reef, enriched with exceptional island life.
  • There are exceptional opportunities to discover the exotic life of the Maldives underwater. Snorkelers will find a kaleidoscope of colours in our house reef, and divers can explore an ancient shipwreck dive site just off the island.
  • Machchafushi Island Resort & Spa Maldives, The Centara Collection, provides easy access to some of the world’s most famous dive sites. At our all-inclusive resort in the beautiful Maldives, we cater to the desires of every traveller, from couples seeking a romantic getaway to families looking for an adventurous holiday.

As the sun sets, relish a delicious dinner at one of the resort’s all-inclusive restaurants, followed by a peaceful night under the stars.

End the day with cocktails by the beach and a themed dinner featuring seafood or international cuisine.

packages.overview:
• Some escapes beckon you with a promise of serenity, where your everyday fades into the background while you immerse yourself in the rhythm of the island's heartbeat. Welcome to such an escape on a dreamy island hideaway, enveloped by uninterrupted hues of blue, nestled on a secluded stretch of sand in North Malé Atoll. A 40-minute speedboat ride away from Male lies this truly Maldivian experience, blending cultural elements with contemporary elegance and bursts of chic tropical vibes. It's a fairytale that feels a world away yet wrapped in homely warmth. Intimate yet larger than life, elevated with our heartwarming and discreet hospitality.

  • Your escape to paradise unfolds into a tantalising culinary journey plated just for you. Every dish tells a tale of diverse and exquisite tastes garnished with our magical touch. Our chefs bring culinary delights from around the world while staying rooted in the richness of authentic Maldivian cuisine. From tranquil sunset cocktails at Bay Rouge to the understated elegance of NÜ serving Mediterranean-style seafood, every dining spot is a unique gastronomic escape.

Upon landing at Velana International Airport in Malé, you’ll be greeted and transferred via a scenic 40-minute speedboat ride to the lush island of VARU. After a warm welcome, check in to your elegant Beach Villa surrounded by white sands and swaying palms. Spend your first afternoon unwinding on your private veranda or dipping your toes in the warm turquoise lagoon. In the evening, enjoy a gourmet dinner at Lime & Chili, the main restaurant offering international delights as part of VARU’s premium all-inclusive plan.

Spend your afternoon lounging poolside, swimming, or enjoying the vibrant island scenery. For your final evening, celebrate with a romantic private beach dinner or join a themed event hosted by the resort, creating a perfect final night in paradise.

packages.overview:
• Embrace the magical Indian Ocean experience from a vibrant beach or overwater villa, offering stunning ocean views. Refreshingly friendly, caring service and playfully designed spaces create a fun, free-spirited stay.
  • A fun, chilled-out balance is at the heart of the dining experience at the limited-service all day dining restaurant, Element X. Share memorable family moments over flavoursome feasts and convenient self-service beverage counters. Immerse in a multi-layered experience at the lively X360 bar – with a uniquely interactive, fun, and exuberant ambience.
  • OBLU XPERIENCE Ailafushi is a Green Globe certified resort. Sensitive handling of island ecosystems, sustainable drinking water solutions, supporting local communities, and other green initiatives are the norm here.

packages.overview:
• The Maldives is a tropical island nation located in the Indian Ocean, southwest of Sri Lanka and India. Comprising 26 atolls and over 1,000 coral islands, the Maldives is renowned for its crystal-clear turquoise waters, powdery white-sand beaches, luxurious overwater villas, and vibrant coral reefs. It is one of the world’s most sought-after honeymoon and luxury travel destinations.

  • The Maldives pioneered the concept of luxurious water villas with direct lagoon access.

  • Home to some of the most diverse and vibrant marine ecosystems, ideal for diving and snorkeling.

packages.overview:
• Medhufushi Island Resort is a heaven of peace and relaxation. An air of tranquility pervades the idyllic island which is adorned with shady coconut trees and tropical flowers. Surrounding the island is a spectacular lagoon in shades of turquoise and shimmering azure blue. If you want to get away from it all and experience affordable, laid-back rustic at a Maldives resort, you can’t find anywhere better than Medhufushi Island Resort.
  • When only pure luxury will do, Medhufushi Spa has everything you need to feel relaxed, refreshed and revived. Located over the crystal-clear water of the lagoon, this stunning spa treats its visitors to an array of indulgent experiences, from classic spa treatments to luxurious therapies inspired by the changing seasons. Combining modern and traditional therapies Medhufushi Spa is the perfect place to unwind. Our four treatment suites can be reserved and is a must-visit for honeymooners and couples looking for a truly special experience.

packages.overview:
• The island of Mauritius was uninhabited before its first recorded visit by Arab sailors in the end of the 10th century. Its name Dina Arobi has been associated with Arab sailors who first discovered the island.
  • Mauritius Island is relatively young geologically, having been created by volcanic activity some 8 million years ago. Together with Saint Brandon, Réunion, and Rodrigues, the island is part of the Mascarene Islands.
  • Lagoon Attitude has also an idyllic location for windsurfing and kitesurfing in Mauritius. Its typical Mauritian architecture and natural decoration offer a peaceful Mauritian stay.

Upon your arrival at Mauritius airport, you will be warmly welcomed by a Travelxploria representative. From there, you will be comfortably escorted to your resort in a private vehicle.

After checking in at the resort, take some time to refresh and unwind. If time permits, feel free to explore the nearby surroundings at your own pace or simply relax and soak in the peaceful ambiance of the island.

As evening sets in, enjoy a delicious dinner served at the resort, savoring the delightful flavors with your family. Later, retreat to the comfort of your cozy bed for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

packages.overview:
• An inspired island retreat where mind, body and spirit rejoice, JW Marriott Mauritius Resort is set against the dramatic backdrop of UNESCO World Heritage Site, Le Morne Brabant Mountain.
  • Located on the spectacular Le Morne Peninsula, this luxury resort benefits from an exceptional coastal position, with endless views across white sands, protected coral reefs and the sparkling Indian Ocean.
  • A haven for leisure, our immersive quality inspires rest and relaxation. Combining Mauritian grace and modern comfort, 169 suites offer calm sanctuary, some with direct beach access and lagoon vistas. Fostering connection, there is a rich array of activities and mindful experiences to suit all generations.
  • The island’s culinary tradition is reflected at the five dining venues, where the choice ranges from local cuisine to world-class Indian, Japanese and Pan Asian options. The resort intentionally guides you to reconnect with the natural world.

packages.package_name: Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa
packages.overview:
• Located on an island in the Indian Ocean, the Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius is an adult-only resort offering a serene tropical getaway on Mauritius's eastern shores. Experience stunning ocean views, beach activities, and nearby attractions like Grand Bay and Flacq Market. Our 4-star resort features comfortable rooms with modern amenities, including two on-site restaurants, a spa, a pool, and a stylish conference room with picturesque views, ideal for intimate meetings of up to 16 attendees.
  • Experience comfort at Radisson Blu Poste Lafayette Resort & Spa, Mauritius, an exclusive adults-only haven. Delight in a unique culinary adventure at one of our onsite dining options, rejuvenate your senses at our serene on-site spa, and stay active at our state-of-the-art fitness center.
  • Bask in the sun by our pristine pool, or explore the stunning surroundings with our convenient bike rental service. Enjoy the added comforts of concierge assistance, free Wi-Fi, and 24-hour room service, for an unforgettable stay.

As evening sets in, enjoy a delicious dinner served at the resort, savoring the delightful flavors with your family. Later, retreat to the comfort of your cozy bed for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

packages.overview:
• Located in the Indian Ocean, Mauritius is renowned for its white-sand beaches, turquoise lagoons, and coral reefs — making it a top destination for relaxation and water activities.

  • The island offers a rich cultural blend of Indian, French, Creole, Chinese, and African influences, reflected in its cuisine, festivals, and everyday life.

  • Beyond its beaches, Mauritius boasts lush green mountains, scenic waterfalls, nature parks, and adventure activities like hiking, snorkeling, dolphin watching, and more.

packages.overview:
• Part of Mauritius’s undeveloped east coast, 3*+ Friday Attitude hotel is nestled in the peaceful fishing village of Trou d’Eau Douce. It has a deeply relaxing atmosphere that’s ideal for a holiday with your family, friends or partner.
  • Come for the salty smell of the Indian Ocean, and the typically blue tropical sky. And come to enjoy a magnificent fine-sand beach, and to indulge in simply doing nothing, swimming or watersports. Accompanying you throughout your stay, our Family Members will provide a welcome filled with Mauritius’ famous cheerfulness.
  • Throughout your holiday, expect zero stress. Instead, the forecast is for fun and relaxation– because, here, it's Friday every day!

Welcome to the enchanting island nation of the Indian Ocean — your unforgettable Mauritius family holiday begins here!

Upon your arrival at the Mauritius airport, a Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and escort you to your resort in comfort.

After checking in, take some time to refresh and relax. Depending on your arrival time, feel free to explore the nearby surroundings at your own pace or simply unwind and soak in the serene beauty of the island.

As evening descends, delight in a delicious dinner served at the resort — a perfect time to savor local flavors and enjoy quality moments with your family. Afterward, retreat to the comfort of your room for a restful night’s sleep, recharging for the exciting days ahead.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam International Airport","to":"Mauritius","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":388,"h_name":"Friday Attitude Hotel","h_country":"Mauritius","h_city":"Mauritius","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Friday Attitude Hotel/1739524146487-Friday Attitude Hotel 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Friday Attitude Hotel/1739524146559-Friday Attitude Hotel 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Mauritius/Friday Attitude Hotel/1739524146598-Friday Attitude Hotel.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day South Island Tour","day_summary":"

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at a scenic spot, soaking in breathtaking ocean views in your accommodation. After that our friendly Travelxploria representative welcomes you at your hotel for a comfortable pick-up, to explore the Mauritius' wild and scenic South. Next, venture to the sacred Grand Bassin (Ganga Talao), where the towering statue of Lord Shiva stands in serene beauty. Next, drive through the lush landscapes of Black River Gorges National Park, a paradise of waterfalls and rare wildlife. Marvel at the surreal Chamarel Seven Colored Earth, where nature paints the ground in stunning hues, and witness the powerful Chamarel Waterfall cascading into the jungle. Feel the energy of La Vallée des Couleurs, where thrilling activities like quad biking and ziplining await. As the day winds down, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with the soulful essence of untouched beauty.

As the day winds down, sail back to the mainland, where your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back at your hotel, leaving you with sun-kissed memories of an unforgettable island escape.

Rise and shine with our representative from Travelxploria will greet you for a seamless pick-up in a private vehicle as you embark on an unforgettable North Island tour. Start your day with a delightful breakfast in hotel sipping fresh tropical juices while the waves set the perfect vibe. With your expert guide, explore the vibrant capital Port Louis, wandering through the historic Aapravasi Ghat and the lively Central Market, where spices and souvenirs fill the air with exotic aromas. Stroll along the Caudan Waterfront, indulging in boutique shopping and scenic harbor views. Next, marvel at the serene beauty of Pamplemousses Botanical Garden, home to giant water lilies and rare plant species. After a delicious Mauritian lunch (optional), continue to Grand Baie, the island’s lively coastal town, perfect for a relaxing beach walk or some retail therapy. As the sun begins to set, your guide ensures a smooth drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Mauritius.

Travelxploria representative will receive you and transfer you to Bangaram Island for check-in and relaxation.
Enjoy an optional excursion to Thinnakkara Island for beach exploration and swimming with turtles, then return to Bangaram.
Spend the day at leisure or indulge in optional water activities at Bangaram Island.
After breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will drop you at Agatti Airport for your onward journey.

Day excursion to Thinnakkara","day_summary":"

On this day, we have planned an exciting excursion to Thinnakkara Island, located just 20 minutes away from Bangaram Island. After a short boat ride, you'll arrive at this beautiful, uninhabited island, perfect for exploration. Take a leisurely walk around the island, enjoying the stunning natural beauty, serene surroundings, and pristine sandy beaches. Feel free to take a refreshing dip in the clear waters, swim with the turtles, and snorkel in the shallow waters to admire the colorful marine life. The island offers a peaceful atmosphere, ideal for relaxing and immersing yourself in nature. After a memorable day spent exploring Thinnakkara, you'll return to Bangaram Island by boat in the evening. Relax at your resort for the night, with dinner served, reflecting on your beautiful island experience. This unforgettable day promises to be one of the highlights of your Lakshadweep adventure. Overnight stay at the resort.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Bangaram island","day_summary":"

Today, enjoy a full day at the beautiful Bangaram Island, a true tropical paradise surrounded by turquoise waters and soft, sandy beaches. Spend the day at your own pace, indulging in leisure activities or simply relaxing by the serene shoreline. For those seeking adventure, this is the perfect opportunity to experience a range of exciting water activities such as snorkeling, kayaking, windsurfing, or scuba diving, all amidst the vibrant marine life and colorful coral reefs. The calm lagoons and crystal-clear waters of Bangaram make it an ideal spot for both beginners and seasoned adventurers. You can also stroll along the pristine beaches, soak up the sun, or just unwind while enjoying the island’s untouched natural beauty. As the sun sets, marvel at the stunning views over the ocean before heading back to your accommodation. Overnight stay at Bangaram Island, ensuring a truly unforgettable experience in this island paradise.

packages.overview:
• Report at the Lakshadweep Wharf, board the ship, and depart by 1500 hrs. Enjoy lunch, evening tea, and dinner onboard.

  • Arrive at Kavaratti at 0845 hrs, enjoy activities like glass-bottom boat, snorkeling, kayaking, and visit the museum. Depart at 1700 hrs.

  • Arrive at Kalpeni at 0800 hrs, enjoy snorkeling, sea bath, folk dance, and sightseeing. Depart at 1730 hrs.

  • Arrive at Minicoy at 0945 hrs, visit the lighthouse, swim, kayak, and explore the village. Depart at 1600 hrs.

  • Arrive in Kochi and disembark between 1100 hrs and 1500 hrs.

packages.overview:
Travelxploria representative will receive you at Agatti Airport and assist with a boat transfer to Kavaratti Island for check-in and relaxation.
Enjoy sightseeing around Kavaratti, visiting the local village, lighthouse, and serene beaches, followed by a relaxed evening.
Boat transfer back to Agatti, followed by sightseeing at South Beach, Eastern Jetty, and an afternoon boat trip to the beautiful Kalpitti Island.
Relax at Agatti Island or opt for an optional visit to the stunning Thinnakkara Island (payable at the property).
After breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with a timely transfer to Agatti Airport for your departure.

After a delightful breakfast, set out for a day of sightseeing and exploration. Begin by visiting a local village, where you can immerse yourself in the island’s simple yet vibrant way of life, observing the daily routines and traditions of the warm, friendly community. Next, proceed to the island’s iconic lighthouse, an impressive structure offering panoramic views of the stunning coastline and azure waters — a perfect spot for photography and soaking in the beauty of your surroundings. Continue your journey to one of the serene beaches, where you can stroll along the soft sands, enjoy the gentle sea breeze, and perhaps take a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. As the day winds down, spend a relaxing evening at the beach, watching the sun set over the horizon. Later, return to your accommodation to unwind and relax, ending another wonderful day on this enchanting island.

On this day, our TravelXploria representative will transfer you to the boat jetty for your vessel journey to Agatti Island, a scenic sea transfer that takes approximately 2.5 hours. Upon arrival at Agatti jetty, our local assistant will warmly receive you and escort you to your homestay. After refreshing yourself, you will proceed for an Agatti Island sightseeing tour, including visits to the picturesque South Beach and the Eastern Jetty, the main point for ship embarkation and disembarkation. Following lunch, embark on an exciting afternoon excursion to Kalpitti Island, a small, uninhabited paradise located at the southern tip of Agatti. Accompanied by an experienced guide, you will take a private boat for a 30-minute journey across stunning waters. Enjoy the pristine sandy beaches, swim alongside turtles, and snorkel in the crystal-clear, shallow waters. After sightseeing on foot, return to Agatti in the evening to relax. Dinner will be served at 8:30 PM, followed by an overnight stay at Agatti.

Today is yours to relax, rejuvenate, and soak in the untouched beauty of Agatti Island. Wake up to the serene sounds of the ocean and enjoy a leisurely breakfast at your stay. Spend your day strolling along the pristine white sandy beaches, basking under the warm tropical sun, or simply unwinding amidst the island’s tranquil surroundings.

If you are feeling adventurous, you may opt to indulge in optional activities like kayaking, stand-up paddleboarding, or snorkeling to discover the vibrant coral reefs nearby. Explore the local village, interact with friendly islanders, or capture the breathtaking coastal scenery through your lens.

Whether you choose to dive into the azure waters, relax with a book under a swaying palm, or enjoy a quiet sunset by the beach, your leisure day at Agatti promises to be a perfect blend of relaxation and natural beauty.

Overnight stay at Agatti.

packages.overview:
Arrive at Agatti Airport, freshen up, and enjoy sightseeing covering South Beach and Eastern Jetty.
Morning water activities followed by an afternoon boat trip to the beautiful Kalpitty Island for snorkeling and beach fun.
Relax and enjoy a leisure day at Agatti Island at your own pace.
After breakfast, transfer to Agatti Airport for your return journey.

Later, return to your accommodation to unwind and enjoy a peaceful night’s stay at Agatti.

Begin your day with thrilling water activities, diving into the clear waters of Agatti to enjoy snorkeling, scuba diving, and more. Discover vibrant coral reefs and colorful marine life that make these experiences truly unforgettable. After a refreshing morning, return for lunch and prepare for an exciting afternoon excursion to Kalpitti Island. This small, uninhabited paradise lies at the southern tip of Agatti and is reached via a private boat ride lasting around 20–30 minutes, accompanied by an experienced guide. Once there, you'll be greeted by stunning sandy beaches, crystal-clear shallow waters perfect for snorkeling, and the incredible opportunity to swim alongside graceful sea turtles. Enjoy a leisurely walk around the island’s untouched beauty before heading back to Agatti in the evening. After a relaxing break in your room, dinner will be served at 8:30 PM. Settle in for a peaceful overnight stay at your accommodation in Agatti.

10th October 2024 we went on a trip to Meghalaya and Shillong which was arranged by Travel Exploria . All the beautiful places on our itinerary were well covered and time coordination was perfect .We were able to have a relaxing family trip and visit various tourist spots and get a taste of local cuisine and rich culture .The falls of Shillong ,lush green Meghalaya captivated us with its ethereal beauty . The highlights of our trip was forest safari at Kaziranga National Park were we saw one horned rhinoceros .Travel Exploria did an amazing job with the hotel bookings ,coordinations and tour planning. We have covered multiple international and national trips with travel Exploria since 2017 it’s always been a pleasant experience traveling with them.

{"title":"Indranil Dey","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-01-22","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

This is the 2nd time my parents had a trip with Travelxploria, 1st time was Kashmir, this time was Kerela + Kanyakumari. They had an excellent experience. Both my parents are senior citizens, and they were taken utmost care at all the hotels wherever they had the night stay. They had a dedicated driver who provided end to end support from Kochi to Tiruvanthapuram. Almost all the tourist spots were covered which could be accessible by my parents. Me and my wife have full trust on Travelexporia without any anxiety.

I would always recommend Travelexporia for all my future trips of my parents and will also plan for myself as well.

Special thanks to Sudipto Metay who coordinated the tour.

{"title":"Swagata Chatterjee","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-11","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

overview:
Tropical Delight: Your Gateway to Sun-Kissed Paradises

Bask in the glow of sapphire waters and whispering palms as you step into our Tropical Delight header menu—where each curated escape is a vibrant celebration of sun, sand, and serenity. At Travelxploria, recognized as the Best Travel Agency, we’ve handpicked a spectrum of coastal hideaways, island retreats, and jungle-fringed beaches to satisfy every sun-seeker’s dream. Whether you’re planning a solo adventure, a romantic honeymoon, or a family getaway, our tropical collections promise an unforgettable blend of relaxation and excitement.

Imagine dawn breaking over a secluded lagoon, the horizon painted in molten gold. As your chosen best package unfolds, start the day with a private yoga session under a canopy of coconut palms, followed by a gourmet breakfast of freshly picked tropical fruit and locally sourced pastries. From there, the turquoise waters beckon: snorkel alongside rainbow-hued fish, glide through hidden coves on a glass-bottomed kayak, or simply float aloft on a paddleboard, letting the gentle sea breeze soothe your senses.

For newlyweds in search of the best honeymoon package, our Tropical Delight offerings are second to none. Picture an overwater villa where your deck extends into crystalline shallows, perfect for an impromptu sunset dip. Evenings are reserved for candlelit dinners on the beach, complete with a personalized menu prepared by a private chef. As the stars emerge overhead, let the gentle lap of waves and a live acoustic serenade set the scene for romance. This is the kind of tailor-made bliss that cements Travelxploria’s reputation as the Best International Travel Agent for honeymooners.

Families will find our tropical escapes equally enchanting. Our family-focused itineraries include eco-friendly excursions through hidden mangrove forests, where little ones can marvel at playful otters and exotic birdlife. Thrill-seekers in the group can swap snorkels for jet skis or embark on guided rainforest hikes that end in secret waterfalls. When downtime calls, parents can unwind with a beachfront spa treatment while kids build sandcastles under the watchful eye of our trained guides. This balance of adventure and relaxation exemplifies why we’re celebrated as the Best Tour Operator for family vacations.

If your wanderlust reaches beyond domestic shores, trust Travelxploria—esteemed as the Best International Tour Operator—to extend your Tropical Delight journey worldwide. From private transfers that whisk you from an international airport to a palm-thatched bungalow, to insider access at local festivals celebrating island culture, every detail is managed with precision. Our expert planners handle visa requirements, custom excursions, and dietary preferences, ensuring that the only surprise you encounter is the sheer beauty of each beach-side panorama.

What sets our Tropical Delight theme apart is a commitment to sustainable luxury. We collaborate with eco-lodges built on stilts above marine reserves, partner with local conservation projects to protect sea turtles, and offer carbon-offset options on every booking. When you travel with the best value tour package from Travelxploria, you’re not only indulging your senses—you’re leaving a positive footprint on the landscapes you love.

Customization lies at the heart of every journey. Craving an al fresco movie night on the sand? Check. Dreaming of a dawn-surf lesson guided by a local pro? Consider it arranged. Yearning for a coastal cooking class where you learn to prepare fresh ceviche and coconut curries? Your personal culinary guide awaits. These bespoke touches transform a standard itinerary into a deeply personal story—one that you’ll recount for years to come.

So as you explore our “Tropical Delight” menu, envision palm-fringed beaches, sparkling horizons, and warm breezes inviting you to relax, explore, and connect. With Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency—you’re not just booking a trip; you’re crafting a sun-soaked chapter in your travel story. Dive into our Tropical Delight collections today, and let the island magic begin.
